name: Kidz In Motion LLC
recent_news: Listed in CT directories as a school transportation service at 60 Connolly Pkwy #11-214, Hamden (a suite/mailbox address). Owner Anthony Jefferson. No M&A, ownership change, or strategic news found (Jun 2026); not affiliated with kidzinmotion.org (a pediatric PT conference) nor the SC-based 'Kidz In Motion Transportation' in Spartanburg.
fit_notes: Plausible small independent CT operator (Hamden / greater New Haven area) — possibly van/SPED-style student transport given suite-address profile. Worth a low-priority outreach to confirm fleet, contracts, and whether owner is open to a sale; too small to be a stand-alone tuck-in but could be a roll-in if multiple CT micro-operators are consolidated.
